message.content:
[
  {
    "title": "ALLBUS – German General Social Survey (GGSS)",
    "host": "GESIS",
    "subjects": [
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "SOCIAL STRATIFICATION AND GROUPINGS",
      "Minorities",
      "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
      "Cultural and national identity"
    ],
    "description": "Biennial surveys of the German population covering political attitudes and behavior, social structure and stratification, views on minorities and exclusion, and aspects of cultural and national identity."
  },
  {
    "title": "GLES – German Longitudinal Election Study",
    "host": "GESIS",
    "subjects": [
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
      "Cultural and national identity"
    ],
    "description": "Comprehensive election study series in Germany focusing on voter behavior, political attitudes, party identification, and campaign effects across multiple components and waves."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP – Social Inequality (module series)",
    "host": "GESIS",
    "subjects": [
      "SOCIAL STRATIFICATION AND GROUPINGS",
      "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
      "Political behaviour and attitudes"
    ],
    "description": "Cross-national survey modules examining perceptions of social inequality, fairness, stratification, welfare, redistribution, and social mobility."
  },
  {
    "title": "ISSP – National Identity (module series)",
    "host": "GESIS",
    "subjects": [
      "Cultural and national identity",
      "Minorities",
      "Political behaviour and attitudes"
    ],
    "description": "Cross-national modules studying national identity, patriotism, citizenship, immigration, multiculturalism, and attitudes toward minorities."
  },
  {
    "title": "EVS – European Values Study (Integrated Dataset)",
    "host": "GESIS",
    "subjects": [
      "Cultural and national identity",
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Equality, inequality and social exclusion"
    ],
    "description": "Longitudinal cross-national dataset on fundamental values, including identity, social trust, political orientations, religion, and views on equality and exclusion."
  },
  {
    "title": "Eurobarometer Trend Files (series)",
    "host": "GESIS",
    "subjects": [
      "Political behaviour and attitudes",
      "Equality, inequality and social exclusion",
      "Minorities",
      "Cultural and national identity"
    ],
    "description": "Consolidated trend files from Eurobarometer surveys of European public opinion, including modules on discrimination, social inclusion, cultural identity, and political attitudes."
  }
]
